caption: In a brightly lit indoor setting with pale yellow walls and white curtains, two men stand prominently in the foreground. On the left, a man wears a light pink long-sleeved shirt under a black sleeveless jacket with a white ID badge clipped to the front. To the right, another man is dressed in a white short-sleeved button-down shirt and holds a black microphone to his mouth, appearing to speak. In the background, other men are visible, including one wearing a tan blazer and a white face mask. The scene remains static across the sequence, with the individuals maintaining their positions and attire. The man in white continues to hold the microphone, while the man in the black jacket stands attentively beside him. There is no visible on-screen text or logos present in the scene.
